import pytest
from source import pascal

def test_pascal_triangle_row_lengths_and_last_element():
    """The triangle must contain n rows, each row must have the correct length,
    and the final element of each row must be 1."""
    n = 3
    triangle = pascal(n)
    expected_lengths = [1, 2, 3]
    actual_lengths = [len(row) for row in triangle]
    assert len(triangle) == n, f"Expected {n} rows, got {len(triangle)}"
    assert actual_lengths == expected_lengths, (
        f"Row lengths incorrect: expected {expected_lengths}, got {actual_lengths}"
    )
    assert triangle[-1][-1] == 1, (
        f"Last element of the last row should be 1, got {triangle[-1][-1]}"
    )
